summary: Full E2E testing completed for both Influencer and Business flows. Core flows work correctly. Found 1 critical bug in error handling.

ui_bugs.issue: Error message shows technical error 'Failed to execute json on Response: body stream already read' instead of user-friendly message when login fails with wrong password

action_items: Fix error handling in authApi.login() - the response body is being read twice causing 'body stream already read' error. Need to clone response or handle error differently
critical_code_review_comments: In /app/frontend/src/lib/api.js line 97-108: The login function reads res.json() but if the response is not valid JSON or already consumed, it throws a technical error. Should add try-catch around json parsing.
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during E2E testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full E2E flows tested: 1) Influencer: signup -> OTP -> profile -> preferences -> payment (Stripe) - ALL WORKING. 2) Business: signup -> OTP -> profile -> preferences -> brands -> brand-setup -> brand-bio -> brand-campaigns -> campaign -> campaign-type - ALL WORKING. 3) Sign-in flow works correctly. 4) Error handling has a bug showing technical error instead of user-friendly message.

influencer_flow.profile_page: PASS - All fields fillable, social connect buttons visible
influencer_flow.preferences_page: PASS - Categories, tones, pillars, audiences, regions selectable

error_handling.wrong_password: FAIL - Shows technical error instead of user-friendly message
error_handling.duplicate_email: NOT TESTED - Registration succeeded before duplicate test

mocked_apis.otp: Hardcoded to 123456 and auto-filled in UI
mocked_apis.stripe: Uses test key sk_test_emergent - sandbox mode
